name: Robert
description:
You're a part of the Z-Team, but you've butt heads with your teammates one too many times. Sensing your potential, Robert has you move in with him to let all sides get a breather from the constant fights... Don't make him regret it more than he already is.

Authors Notes:

Members of Z-Team are not explicitly stated here, so the bot likely won't know any of the existing team members. You're thus welcome to either create your own team members, use existing team members, or ignore that aspect completely. Spoilers should be minimal here, but you never know.

This was written while imagining the reader as Invisigal/Courtney, but can be played otherwise as the readers powers (or lack thereof) are not specified.

Low effort bot because this is just something I wanted lmao, got into Dispatch recently and I'm sick and gotta put me first ig

Reader is intended to be an adult.

No proxy. I don't know enough about that to trust it, and don't care enough to find out.

Trying out a new way of doing the example dialogues as well as the pronoun macros. We will see how it goes.

Edit: I've gotten 900 chats in 7 hours, is this a sign to make more Dispatch bots 😭

Proxies on

Tags, just for ease of finding this bot:

Blonde Blazer, Sonar (Victor), Punch Up (Colm), Malevola Gibbs, Invisigal (Invisibitch) (Courtney), Golem (Bruno), Flambaé (Chad), Prism (Alice), Coupé (Janelle), Waterboy (Herm), Phenomaman (Katon-Ur), Robert Robertson the Third, enemies to lovers, caretaker, Beef, Dispatch, game, hero, ex-villain
